checks.name: manifest-completeness
checks.description: Manifest contains nine complete brand records and exactly 225 required asset records.

checks.name: brand-inventory
checks.description: All nine brand packs contain exactly the required files.

checks.name: filename-policy
checks.description: Asset paths use lowercase kebab case and no ambiguous final suffix.

checks.name: svg-viewbox
checks.description: SVG files parse and contain a nonempty numeric viewBox.

checks.name: raster-dimensions
checks.description: PNG and JPEG dimensions and encodings match the contract.

checks.name: alpha-expectations
checks.description: Transparent logos retain alpha and opaque compositions contain no transparent pixels.

checks.name: ico-frames
checks.description: Every ICO contains valid PNG-compressed 16, 32, and 48 px frames.

checks.name: pdf-pages
checks.description: Pitch PDFs open as one-page US Letter documents.

checks.name: provenance
checks.description: Every asset declares original image and font provenance.

checks.name: alt-text
checks.description: Every asset record contains meaningful alt text.

checks.name: legal-status
checks.description: Every brand and asset remains a P0 concept with explicit review boundaries.

checks.name: canva-status
checks.description: Canva state uses the exact folder inventory plus status-dependent and unique ID semantics.

uniqueIdScopes: root folder plus all 17 child folders
all created brand-board and pitch one-pager designs

checks.name: content-integrity
checks.description: Every manifest SHA-256 matches the committed asset bytes.

checks.name: font-binary-absence
checks.description: No font binaries are bundled in brand packs.

checks.name: repository-scope
checks.description: Branch and working-tree changes do not touch application code or root runtime manifests.

checks.name: canonical-asset-scope
checks.description: When an explicit change base is supplied, no canonical generated asset-pack bytes may change.
